message:
test(text): add comprehensive edge case and stress tests for EditBuffer

Add extensive test coverage for EditBuffer handling of edge cases and
stress scenarios to prevent regressions (bd-2r2p).

Large document tests:
- test_large_document_line_count: 1000-line document navigation
- test_long_line_handling: 1000-character line cursor movement

Undo/redo edge cases:
- test_many_undo_operations: 50 commits with full undo cycle
- test_rapid_insert_delete_cycles: 100 insert/delete cycles

Buffer improvements:
- Enhanced drawing operations for edge cases
- Pixel buffer refinements
- Error handling improvements
- Terminal capabilities updates

Also adds repro test for text drawing issue and syncs beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
